title: Verify the TaskBounty V2 immutable-artifact escrow workflow
description: Execute a Coston2 integration task that binds the task and worker result to exact Keccak-256 content commitments, verifies escrow liabilities, and keeps post-approval transaction evidence separate from the worker deliverable.
deliverables: The version-pinned TaskBounty V2 source and deployment script
The Foundry V2 business test suite and fee-on-transfer mock
The artifact-integrity design document and final result manifest
acceptanceCriteria: The deployed contract returns VERSION 2.0.0 and the configured FTestXRP reward token
createTask records this manifest URI and matching metadataHash
submitWork records the immutable result manifest URI and matching resultHash
totalEscrowed increases by 1000000 after task creation and returns to zero after approval
The V2 Foundry suite passes 11 tests including 256 fuzz runs
The completion transaction and payment evidence are generated after approval and are not required inside the worker result
